mapper.select: /* SQL ID : PopupNtcDAO.selectPopupNtc 설 명 : 팝업공지 단건 조회 */ SELECT A.POPUP_NTC_ID , A.ORG_ID , C.ORGNM AS ORG_NM , A.POPUP_NTC_TTL , A.POPUP_NTC_CTS , A.POPUP_NTC_SDTTM , A.POPUP_NTC_EDTTM , A.POPUP_NTC_TDSTOP_USEYN , A.USEYN , A.POPUP_NTC_TRGT , A.POPUP_PNTTIME_GBNCD , A.RGTR_ID , A.REG_DTTM , A.MDFR_ID , A.MOD_DTTM , B.POPUP_WIN_WDTHSZ , B.POPUP_WIN_HGHT , B.POPUP_WIN_XCRD , B.POPUP_WIN_YCRD FROM TB_LMS_POPUP_NTC A LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_POPUP_NTC_PSTN_SIZE B ON A.POPUP_NTC_ID = B.POPUP_NTC_ID LEFT JOIN TB_LMS_ORG C ON A.ORG_ID = C.ORG_ID WHERE A.POPUP_NTC_ID = #{popupNtcId}
/* SQL ID : PopupNtcDAO.selectOrgList 설 명 : 기관 목록 조회 */ SELECT ORG_ID , ORGNM AS ORG_NM FROM TB_LMS_ORG WHERE USEYN = 'Y' ORDER BY ORGNM
